title: Realms Server Modpack (Season 13.5)
description: Modpack for a Minecraft server. If you haven't heard about it, you shouldn't bother looking at this.
body:
# Modpack for the REALMS Minecraft Server.

If you want to join the realm server, install this and join with the IP I sent you.

If you've never heard of this server, don't install it.
_(unless you really really want to, but dont expect anything special)_

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Non-Linked Mods (for versions 12.x)
Copper & Tuff Backport: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copper-tuff-backport-fabric)

### Non-Linked Mods (For version 10.x)
Seeking Hearts: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/seeking-hearts)\
Illuminated-patched: [A fixed version of Illuminated for running on servers](https://modrinth.com/mod/illuminated)\
Carpet 1.21.4: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carpet)

### Non-Linked Mods (For version 9.x):
Epicdiscs: Privately made by a friend\
Copper & Tuff Backport: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copper-tuff-backport-fabric)\
Maced: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/maced)\
Liquid Burner: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/liquid-burner)\
MightyMail: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mighty-mail) (plus dependencies)


-----------------------------------------------------------------------

This modpack is a continuation of the [Survival Realm Season 8](https://modrinth.com/modpack/survival-realm-season-8) modpack
